positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial raccoon peering through a glowing crescent moon. The raccoon is seated comfortably on a cluster of stylized, oversized glowing mushrooms, surrounded by constellations made of glowing sapphire dust. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, featuring bold, clean linework and a strong silhouette. Use a vibrant neon vaporwave palette: deep indigo blues, electric teal, vibrant magenta, and pops of neon yellow. Style should be a blend of psychedelic pop art and modern tattoo flash, highly suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Cinematic, high contrast, flat graphic illustration, perfect for apparel print, volumetric lighting, crisp details.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, grayscale, realistic photo, photorealistic, messy, messy background
